Video.summary: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core

Video.summary: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways; our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Off Guard

Video.summary: El Nińo is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Nińo occurs.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Video.summary: Tornadoes; they are the embodiment of severe weather. In this episode we show some of the most terrifying weather caught on camera; from surviving a direct hit to a tornado in a typhoon.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Tornadoes

Video.summary: Volcanic ash engulfing a town, a massive firenado in California - just some of the viral weather videos caught on camera in this episode of Captured, as Vicious Winds take center stage.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Vicious Winds

Video.summary: A catastrophic earthquake, a mesmerizing avalanche, a destructive tornado, and an unintentional smashup derby on icy highways; our experts weigh in on these viral videos as people get caught off guard by the sudden and powerful forces of nature.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Off Guard

Video.summary: Experience the majesty of what lies beneath the ocean's surface.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.1

Video.summary: Even in the wilds of nature, everybody's a comedian.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.3

Video.summary: Get up close and personal with the creatures that call your backyard home.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.5

Video.summary: Adventure awaits in the heat of the desert plains.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.7

Video.summary: Tag along with these good samaritans on some of the most heart-pounding animal rescues.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.1

Video.summary: The Aquatic life holds a lot of surprises, here are a few for you to enjoy
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.6

Video.summary: Oh, deer! Make room for the deer crossing as these wild woodland creatures take over...your TV.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.2

Video.summary: They say live in the moment. These insects do just that with their short lifespan. Take a look.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 3.7

Video.summary: The North Atlantic Ocean is generous with her bounty, until she takes a life in return. Mark braves the deep seas on the most dangerous day of the lobster fishing season.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters

Video.summary: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core

Video.summary: The North Atlantic Ocean is generous with her bounty, until she takes a life in return. Mark braves the deep seas on the most dangerous day of the lobster fishing season.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters

Video.summary: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core

Video.summary: The North Atlantic Ocean is generous with her bounty, until she takes a life in return. Mark braves the deep seas on the most dangerous day of the lobster fishing season.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Dangerous Waters

Video.summary: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core

Video.summary: Jaclyn Whittal and Mark Robinson are in Tornado Alley to track down some of the most ferocious weather.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Knowing the Enemy

Video.summary: Mark joins George and a team of scientists in exploring the world’s largest lava lake - Mount Nyiragongo.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Ultimate Risk

Video.summary: Trouble during a training session; a rollover traps 4 people and ejects 2 others into a swift-moving river.
Video.title: Hellfire Heroes | What It Takes
